rationale: Educ. Code §29.017 governs transfer of parental rights for students with disabilities at age of majority. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A student with a disability who is 18 years of age or older or whose disabilities of minority have been removed for general purposes under Chapter 31, Family Code, shall have the same right to make educational decisions as a student without a disability
_note: The cited rule concerns special education parental rights transfer and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
